<think>I've opened DOC1_A4 and found the exact evidence. The document shows:

- Company: 三湘印象股份有限公司 (Sanxiang Impression Co., Ltd.)
- 流动资产合计 (Total Current Assets): 5,298,929,206.47 yuan (as of March 31, 2024)

This is approximately 5.3 billion yuan, which is BELOW 6 billion yuan (6,000,000,000).

So for DOC1 (Sanxiang Impression), this company does NOT meet the criteria of having Total Current Assets above 6 billion yuan.

"流动资产合计|5,298,929,206.47|5,508,403,638.98|"
